ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" INTEGER /* Type of client (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Member ID of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "id_type" TEXT /* Type of ID (e.g., passport, national ID, driver's license) */,
  "id_number" TEXT /* ID number of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the client type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who took the loan */,
  "loan_number" TEXT /* Loan number */,
  "date_of_disb" TEXT /* Date of loan disbursement */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Loan amount */,
  "os_bal_bf" TEXT /* Outstanding balance before */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Loan period */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "repayment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of repayment */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan */,
  "disbursed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who disbursed the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_disbursed_by FOREIGN KEY ("disbursed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_interest" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan interest */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "loan_interest" TEXT /* Loan interest */,
  "total_loan_amount" TEXT /* Total loan amount (interest + principal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_interest_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan repayment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of loan repayment */,
  "repayment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of loan repayment */,
  "repayment_method" TEXT /* Method of repayment */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Additional late fee charged */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_repayments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, credit analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who applied for the loan */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Loan amount applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "application_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the application status */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "credit_score" TEXT /* Credit score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was calculated */,
  "credit_score_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the credit score */,
  "credit_score_range" TEXT /* Range of the credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the loan setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan setting */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
